chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.193 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.1783/2022 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 13.12.2024 M/s. Ammar Sooria & Talha Javed, Advocates for the appellants. Mr. Obaid-ur-Rehman, Advocate for respondent No.1..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellants has filed a statement alongwith certain documents copy whereof has been provided to Mr. Obaid-ur-Rehman. Without prejudice to anybody’s rights, the statement alongwith documents are taken on record. Mr. Obaid- ur-Rehman at the very outset has stated that during the pendency of this appeal and in view of the ad-interim order passed by this Bench, the work has already been completed and that has rendered this appeal as infructuous. This being a situation and without prejudice to the appellants’ rights, this appeal is not pressed by the appellants alongwith listed application. Order accordingly. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
